completed_steps.summary: Loaded documentation-requirements.csv (12 project types). Part 'parties' → backend.
index.md present → user chose full_rescan/deep after being informed src/ is byte-identical to prior generation (only Directory.Packages.props versions changed).

Monolith confirmed: Hexalith.Parties.slnx. Current count after Epic 4 documentation verification: 14 source project folders + 15 test/e2e folders. Submodules now checked out but external deps, not parts.

~25 existing docs inventoried; hand-maintained ones (getting-started, event-*, gdpr-*, deployment-*, kubernetes-*, tenant-access, frontend/, spikes/) linked not overwritten. Emphasis: domain/event-sourcing + API/contracts.
Tech stack refreshed from Directory.Packages.props: Aspire 13.4.0 (AppHost SDK 13.3.3 skew), Dapr 1.18.0-rc02/1.17.9, MCP 1.3.0, Testcontainers 4.12.0 (unused), etc.
Deep analysis via 6 parallel agents, cross-verified. Catalog: 22 commands, 43 events (24+19), 5 Parties actors + AggregateActor, 5 MCP tools. New defects found (see findings.new_discrepancies).
source-tree-analysis.md refreshed: exact counts (22 cmds / 24+19 events), submodules-now-checked-out section corrected.

development-guide.md refreshed (Testcontainers-unused correction). Deployment summarized in architecture.md §12 and linked to hand-maintained deployment-guide.md / kubernetes-deployment-architecture.md (not regenerated).

Single-part architecture.md regenerated: versions refreshed; §8 strengthened with LocalDevKeyStorageBackend production-data-loss risk; §13 gotchas expanded with index-rebuild key bug, README MCP-tools error, Aspire SDK skew, AdminPortal stubs, unenforced Pact gate. No per-part files (monolith).

Supporting docs refreshed: project-overview.md, data-models.md (22 cmds/43 events re-verified), api-contracts.md (5 MCP tools re-verified), component-inventory.md (index-bug pointer + version refresh). Also refreshed _bmad-output/project-context.md version table. No project-parts.json/integration-architecture.md (single-part).
index.md regenerated; Known discrepancies section expanded (5 items incl. LocalDev KMS risk, README MCP error, index-rebuild bug, Aspire skew, submodule status). Zero '(To be generated)' markers.

Validation: 8 generated docs + index present; zero incomplete markers; no stale version stragglers (10.0.300 = correct SDK pin); all internal .md links resolve; state file valid JSON; checklist satisfied for single-part backend.
Finalized. workflow.on_complete resolved empty — no terminal instruction.

findings.project_classification: Monolith / single cohesive .NET 10 solution; backend event-sourced party domain service with embedded Blazor UI; behind a Hexalith.EventStore gateway.
findings.technology_stack: .NET 10 (SDK 10.0.300) + Aspire 13.4.0 + DAPR 1.18/1.17 + Hexalith.EventStore + Blazor/FluentUI 5.0-rc.3; CPM on; TreatWarningsAsErrors; MinVer.
findings.domain: Single Party aggregate (Person|Organization); 22 commands; 43 events (24 state-change + 19 rejection); CQRS read models PartyDetail & PartyIndexEntry; markers IEventPayload / IRejectionEvent.
findings.api: EventStore gateway POST /api/v1/commands & /api/v1/queries (Domain=party); typed client (Command/Query/AdminPortalGdpr); parties-mcp = exactly 5 stateless HTTP tools.
new_discrepancies: README.md:17 + getting-started.md claim parties-mcp has 6 tools incl get_party_name_at — FALSE. Ground truth = 5 tools (create_party,get_party,find_parties,update_party,delete_party). RECOMMEND fixing README + getting-started.
BUG: PartyIndexProjectionActor live state key {tenant}:party-index:default vs ProjectionRebuildService {tenant}:party-index:all (ProjectionRebuildService.cs:460) — rebuild diverges from live index.
RISK: LocalDevKeyStorageBackend (in-memory) is the only registered IKeyStorageBackend, no prod guard/warning; with CryptoShredding:IsEnabled=true default, prod restart destroys all key material.
README 'GDPR not in MVP' contradicts default-ON crypto-shredding + working consent/restriction/erasure handlers (warning switch GdprFeaturesActive default false is the real referent).
Aspire SDK/package skew: AppHost SDK 13.3.3 vs packages 13.4.0.
AdminPortal GDPR client GetErasureCertificateAsync + RetryErasureVerificationAsync are inert ContractUnavailable (501) stubs.
Testcontainers 4.12.0 declared in CPM, referenced by zero test projects.
CI contract-test (Pact) job unenforced — root Pact scripts absent; self-reports CONCERNS and is skipped.
DAPR client/runtime gap: Dapr.Client/Actors 1.18.0-rc02 vs Dapr.AspNetCore 1.17.9 vs runtime baseline 1.14.4 (intentional).

applied_source_fixes: README.md:13 + docs/getting-started.md:432 — removed phantom get_party_name_at; MCP tool list now correctly lists 5 tools.
recommended_source_fixes_not_applied: docs/getting-started.md + docs/kubernetes-deployment-architecture.md: stale package versions (hand-maintained; left untouched).
src/Hexalith.Parties.Projections/Services/ProjectionRebuildService.cs:460: index rebuild key (:all) vs live actor key (:default).
src/Hexalith.Parties.Security: add a production guard/warning for LocalDevKeyStorageBackend.
README.md:5 GDPR notice still says crypto-shredding 'not in MVP' while it ships enabled-by-default (left as-is; scoped out of this fix).
resume_instructions: Full rescan complete (2026-06-02). Epic 4 retrospective documentation verification updated stale project counts on 2026-06-10. To refresh again, re-run /bmad-document-project (detects index.md → offers rescan/deep-dive).
